title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 346.137 - Licensure under other chapters
text:
346.137.  Licensure under other chapters. — No part of this act* shall be construed to allow individuals to diagnose and treat medical conditions pursuant to chapter 334.
(L. 1995 S.B. 69, et al. § 1) 
*"This act" (S.B. 69, et al., 1995) contained numerous sections. Consult Disposition of Sections table for a definitive listing.
